title: Human-reviewed conflict + duplicate resolution workflow
context: Conflict and duplicate resolution must keep a human in the loop and remain conflict-faithful — contradictory findings are retained side-by-side, never flattened. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Build a human-reviewed conflict + duplicate resolution workflow where merges are reversible, preserve all source provenance + evidence levels, and contradictory findings are retained side-by-side.
acceptanceCriteria: No automatic merge/conflict-resolution ships without human confirmation; merges are reversible and preserve all source provenance + evidence levels.
Contradictory findings are retained side-by-side (conflict-faithful), not flattened.
output: Conflict/duplicate-resolution workflow code + tests, committed via PR.
